internal_anchors.total_links: verified by test suite (2074 tests, 0 failures)
internal_anchors.details: All internal href='#...' targets and showTab() calls verified by test.js Section 3 (Internal Links). showTab() function uses fallback pattern: tries getElementById('tab-' + tabId), falls back to getElementById(tabId). All 11 tabs resolve correctly.

4.5 The "Dielectric" Infographic: GRACE L1A and the EM-Gravity Claim
duplicate_ids.note: Two headings share id='dielectric'. First is in the 'model' tab (Part 1.6), second is in the 'pages' tab (Part 4.5 — parked content). Any href='#dielectric' link will always jump to the first occurrence. The second heading should use a unique ID like 'dielectric-infographic'.

tab_structure.details: 11 tabs, all with headings, continuous nav chain. One duplicate ID found: 'dielectric' appears on lines 418 and 1624. Default active tab is 'overview' (correct).

external_links.details: 49 non-citation external links checked (DOI/publisher domains excluded per policy). 48 resolved OK. 1 timeout: geodesy.noaa.gov (government site, likely transient — timed out on both HEAD and GET attempts at 15-20s). All data source links (NOAA, ESA, NASA, INTERMAGNET, etc.) resolved successfully.

data_prose_consistency.details: Build reproducibility check confirms zero diff between freshly built HTML and published docs/index.html. All computed counts (verdict tallies, WIN total, new_in_v51, code_analysis stats) are injected at build time from wins.json — no stale hardcoded values possible when build output matches. Current data: 68 WINs, 29 new_in_v51. Verdict breakdown: Refuted by Data=9, Self-Contradicted=13, Misleading=22, Std Model Explains=16, Not Demonstrated=4, Unfalsifiable=4. code_analysis: 68 reviewed, 0 pending, 25 hardcoded, 4 live_fetch, 39 none, 48 relabels_standard, 66 post_hoc, 2 derives_from_dome.

win_detail_consistency.details: All 68 WINs verified present in summary table (WIN-NNN pattern match). Detail sections generated from wins.json at build time — structure guaranteed by zero-diff build check. 7 detail_groups found with consistent cross-references. Test suite Section 5 (Data Cross-References) covers WIN-level consistency with 0 failures.

build_reproducibility.details: node build.js html produced identical output to docs/index.html. Zero diff lines. Published site exactly matches source data.

issues_found.description: Duplicate HTML id='dielectric' on lines 418 and 1624. First: Part 1.6 'The Dielectric Foundation' (model tab). Second: Part 4.5 'The Dielectric Infographic' (pages tab, parked content). Any anchor link targeting #dielectric will always resolve to the first instance.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Rename the second occurrence to id='dielectric-infographic' in generate-html.js or sections.json. Update any internal links that should target the parked section.

issues_found.description: geodesy.noaa.gov timed out on both attempts (15s HEAD, 20s GET). Likely transient — NOAA government sites can be slow. Not a broken link.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Monitor on next run. If persistent across 3+ runs, verify URL manually and consider adding an alternative link.

summary: Site health is good. All 2074 automated tests pass. Build output is identical to published HTML (zero diff). Nav chain is continuous across all 11 tabs. All 68 WINs have consistent detail anchors and summary rows. 48 of 49 external data links resolve (1 NOAA timeout, likely transient). One moderate issue: duplicate id='dielectric' on lines 418 and 1624 — two headings share the same HTML ID, which means anchor navigation to the second instance is broken. This is a known pre-existing issue from parked content.
